leadText: The Jaw Fossil (Japanese: アゴのカセキ Jaw Fossil) is a fossil introduced in Generation VI that can be regenerated into Tyrunt. It is the counterpart of the Sail Fossil.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Passive effect [ edit | edit source ] If brought to the one of the following locations, the Jaw Fossil can be regenerated into a Tyrunt . Games Location X Y Ambrette Town Fossil Lab OR AS Devon Corporation in Rustboro City S M US UM Fossil Restoration Center on Route 8 ZA Pokémon Research Lab

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods X Y Glittering Cave (choice between this and the Sail Fossil ) OR AS Trade S M Trade US UM Konikoni City ( Olivia's jewelry shop ) US Poké Pelago (Isle Aphun: Rare-Treasure Hunting, Interesting-Item Hunting) ZA Stone Emporium

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V ZA A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that once lived on the land. It looks as if it could be a piece of a large jaw.
